case_title: SILVIA R. VALDIVIEZO VS. JOACHIM THULKE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT THULKE, JOACHIM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT VALDIVIEZO, SILVIA R. DISMISSED - NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AND CROSS-PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
